Slicing_Criteria.SourceCode: return fmt.Sprintf("%s;%s;%s;%02x", login, timestamp, salt, sha1.Sum([]byte(hashInput)))
Slicing_Criteria.ParentFunction: Sign (uri string, body string, login string, apiKey string) string

vulnerability_info.Message: RFC 9155 - Deprecating SHA-1 Signature Hashes in TLS 1.2 and DTLS 1.2.

full_implementation:
func (c *Client) sign(form url.Values, now time.Time) {
	timestamp := strconv.FormatInt(now.UnixMilli(), 10)

	sum := md5.Sum([]byte(c.username + c.password + timestamp))

	form.Set("token", hex.EncodeToString(sum[:]))
	form.Set("username", c.username)
	form.Set("time", timestamp)
}

vulnerability_info.Message: MD5 - RFC 9155 - Deprecating MD5 Signature Hashes in TLS 1.2 and DTLS 1.2. Use MD5 in HMAC is Acceptable But Not Recommended
